projects.title: Coastal Flood Vulnerability Mapping
projects.description: Comprehensive flood vulnerability mapping of the Cox's Bazar coastline using multi-source satellite data and field surveys.

projects.title: Urban Green Space Analysis
projects.description: Geospatial analysis of urban green spaces in Dhaka Metropolitan Area using Sentinel-2 imagery and NDVI mapping.

projects.title: Sundarbans Mangrove Monitoring
projects.description: Long-term mangrove health monitoring using SAR and optical fusion in the Sundarbans UNESCO World Heritage Site.

projects.title: Climate Resilient Agriculture
projects.description: Assessment of climate-smart agriculture practices and their adoption rates in drought-prone northern Bangladesh.

projects.title: River Erosion Hotspot Detection
projects.description: Satellite-based change detection to identify active erosion hotspots along the Jamuna River corridor.

projects.title: Community Solar Micro-Grid
projects.description: Design and impact assessment of off-grid solar micro-grid systems for rural communities in haor areas of Sylhet.

projects.title: Air Quality Monitoring Network
projects.description: Design and deployment of a real-time air quality sensor network across 12 sites in Dhaka Metropolitan Area.

projects.title: Cyclone Shelter Siting Study
projects.description: Multi-criteria GIS analysis for optimal cyclone shelter siting in coastal districts of Barisal division.

projects.title: Wetland Conservation Plan
projects.description: Integrated conservation planning for the haor wetland ecosystem including biodiversity surveys and community mapping.

projects.title: Urban Heat Island Mapping
projects.description: Land surface temperature analysis of Chittagong city using Landsat-8 thermal imagery to identify heat island zones.

projects.title: Community Eco-Education Program
projects.description: National environmental literacy program targeting school children and community leaders across all eight divisions.

projects.title: Land Use Change Detection
projects.description: Multi-temporal land use and land cover change analysis across Bangladesh using time-series satellite imagery.

projects.title: Groundwater Salinity Assessment
projects.description: Spatial assessment of groundwater salinity intrusion in coastal aquifers of southwest Bangladesh.

projects.title: Clean Cooking Initiative
projects.description: Baseline assessment and impact monitoring of improved cookstove adoption in 10,000 rural households.

projects.title: Biodiversity Corridor Mapping
projects.description: Landscape-level mapping of wildlife corridors in the Chittagong Hill Tracts using remote sensing and field data.
